title: enneastemon mannii
intro: Enneastemon mannii, also known as the African bushwillow, is a deciduous tree or shrub native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain. The health benefits of Enneastemon mannii also include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. Enneastemon mannii can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
